affix_details.name: Fortified
affix_details.description: Non-boss enemies have 20% more health and inflict up to 30% increased damage.

affix_details.name: Bolstering
affix_details.description: When any non-boss enemy dies, its death cry empowers nearby allies.

affix_details.name: Raging
affix_details.description: Non-boss enemies enrage at 30% health remaining, dealing 100% increased damage.
